SHARED_DEAD_BRANCH.description: Whenever you [gold]expend[/gold] a card, add a random card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
SHARED_DEAD_BRANCH.flavor: A branch left behind from a long-forgotten era.
SHARED_DEAD_BRANCH.title: Dead Branch
SHARED_CLOCKWORK_SOUVENIR.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{ArtifactPower}[/blue] stacks of [gold]Artifact[/gold].
SHARED_CLOCKWORK_SOUVENIR.flavor: "See all the gears inside? Isn’t it intricate?"
SHARED_CLOCKWORK_SOUVENIR.title: Clockwork Souvenir
SHARED_ORANGE_PELLETS.description: Whenever you play a Skill, Attack, and Power card each in the same turn, remove all negative effects from yourself.
SHARED_ORANGE_PELLETS.flavor: "A medicine made from fungi from all over the tower—cures everything!"
SHARED_ORANGE_PELLETS.title: Orange Pellets
